title: Overenchanted
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7345ade28d290fe2a134a40453a61b8e7a0cb254_0.webp) **Overenchanted** adds awesome new enchantments and curses that take your gear to the next level! Whether you want to strengthen your weapons and armor or add some fun (and dangerous) twists to your equipment, this mod has something for everyone.
## New Enchantments:
- **Blazing Edge** 1-5 (Sword) Grants a chance to ignite nearby enemies on hit. - **Blazing Walker** 1-2 (Boots) Enables you to walk safely on lava. - **Explosive Shot** 1-3 (Bow) Creates a small explosion when hitting a mob (Not breaking blocks). - **Enraged** 1-3 (Chestplate) Increases attack damage by +30% and reduces armor by -20% per level. - **Eternal** Prevents the item from despawning. - **Floating** 1-3 (Bow) Causes the enemy to float for a short period of time. - **Free Riding** (Carrot on a Stick, Warped Fungus on a Stick) Prevents durability from decreasing while boosting speed on a pig or strider. - **Paralysis** 1-3 (Bow) Applies paralysis to a mob, preventing it from moving, jumping, or attacking for a short period of time. - **Reinforced Tip** 1-3 (Tools) Increases the speed of breaking harder materials. - **Fleetfoot** 1-3 (Boots) Increases movement speed by +15% but reduces knockback resistance by -20% per level. - **Aqua Glide** 1-3 (Feet) Boosts swim speed and grants the dolphin effect when hurt. - **Aqua Miner** 1-3 (Head) Increases mining speed while submerged in water. - **High Step** 1-2 (Boots) Increases step height. - **Faster Attack** 1-5 (Sword) Increases attack speed. - **Lifebinder** 1-3 (Sword) Attacking an enemy has a chance to heal your pets within a 5-block radius. - **Stun** 1-4 (Mace) Attacking when falling from over 2 blocks stuns the enemy (excluding bosses). - **Echo Sight** 1-3 (Armor) Reveals hidden targets. Check keybindings to activate. - **Lumberjack** (Axe) Hold the Lumberjack Key to chop down entire trees at once. - **Echo Slayer** 1-5 (Sword) Increases damage dealt to the Warden. - **Sonic Boom Protection** 1-4 (Armor) Reduces damage from the Warden's sonic boom attack. - **Deepfoot** (Boots) Prevents the Warden from detecting the player. - **Combo** (Sword) Increases damage with each consecutive strike, resetting if you hit air or a block. - **Multi Jump** (Boots) Allows you to perform additional jumps in the air. - **Reflect** 1-2 (Shield) Redirects blocked arrows back to the attacker when using a shield. - **Ricochet** 1-4 (Bow) Arrows bounce off walls upon impact. - **True Shoot** 1-2 (Bow) Arrows are unaffected by gravity but travel a shorter distance than regular arrows. - **Weightless** 1-2 (Boots) Reduces the effect of gravity.
## New Curses:
- **Curse Of Breaking** 1-5 (Tools) Items are breaking faster. - **Curse Of Ignorance** (Durability Items) Prevents mobs and blocks from dropping XP. - **Curse Of Inefficiency** 1-5 (Tools) Reduces mining efficiency. - **Curse Of Agony** 1-3 (Armor) Inflicts severe pain when equipped.

![Footer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49e4fb1938d8373165dbd1b619458ccd81d69e35_0.webp) **Overenchanted** is still in development, and I’d love to hear your feedback! If you find any bugs or have suggestions, please report them in the comments. Your input will help make the mod even better!
